metadata.description: Tools for turning scientific models into interactive, explorable GUIs.

plugins.name: model-scope
plugins.description: Turn ANY parameterised model into an interactive explorer: move a slider and watch the simulation update, shown in views the MODEL defines (no fixed graphic/axis) — Bayesian/ideal-observer, efficient-coding & sequential observers, causal inference, working memory, neuron, decision (drift-diffusion), RL, POMDP, saccade, population, or any Monte-Carlo process. A continuous playhead OR a process-mode stage stepper that walks the model's internal pipeline. Schema-driven sliders + a simulate()→views contract + a small plotting helper, no build step. Includes a modelbook of canonical model families (grounded in real open source) + a reusable code library (mslib.js).
